title: Add extra triggers for virtual interfaces
body:
Combo logic dependent on signals driven via virtual interfaces is not being scheduled properly.

This is because as far as `V3Sched` is concerned, there is no connection between virtual interface vars and the corresponding actual interface vars. There cannot be, as which interface is assigned to which virtual interface cannot be determined statically. Especially if we use virtual interfaces behind some virtual calls.

This patch addresses this issue in a similar way to how DPI exports are handled. There is a new extra trigger for each type of virtual interface. Whenever a virtual interface is written to, the corresponding extra trigger is set. This results in all downstream logic being executed.
